publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-04-18 00:06:39 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Newspaper clippings, pamphlets, posters, broadsides, maps, photographs, and other ephemera.
did.abstract: Newspaper clippings, pamphlets, posters, broadsides, maps, photographs, and other ephemera relating to Veterinary Medicine.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Newspaper clippings, pamphlets, posters, broadsides, maps, photographs, and other ephemera relating to Veterinary Medicine. The collection consists of various materials collected by the Flower Sprecher Veterinary Library over several decades.

emph.ref: Series I. Veterinary and Associated Organizations
Series III. Veterinary Legislation and Regulations
Series VI. Audiovisual Material and Graphics

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Veterinary Ephemera Collection, #6610. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

acqinfo.head: PROVENANCE
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the Flower Sprecher Veterinary Library in 2004

did.unittitle: Series I. Veterinary and Associated Organizations

American Veterinary Medical Association - Conference Programs

American Veterinary Medical Association - Contributions to Biomedical Research, an AVMA Council on Research Project, Binder 2
American Association of Lab Animal Practitioners

Delahanty Institute - "Medical and Physical Requirements for Inspector of Foods"
FAO/WHO Meetings on Veterinary Education, folder 1
FAO/WHO Meetings on Veterinary Education, folder 2
FAO/WHO Meetings on Veterinary Education, folder 3
Horse Association of America - Annual Reports
Horse Association of America - Leaflets, by number
Horse Association of America - Misc. Pamphlets
Horse Association of America - News Clippings
Medical Society of the State of New York
New York State Association of Milk Sanitarians
Southern Tier Veterinary Medical Association - General
Southern Tier Veterinary Medical Association - Minutes
Southern Tier Veterinary Medical Association - Minutes
Veterinary Medical Association of New Jersey
Hudson Valley Veterinary Medical Society - Attendance Book

Foot and Mouth Disease - 1902-3 New England outbreak clippings

Tuberculosis - U.S. Department of Agriculture Tuberculosis Eradication - Work Summaries oversized
Series III. Veterinary Legislation and Regulations

New York Board Exams - Guides and Syllabus

United States Bureau of Animal Industry - Accrediting Exams
Dogs - "English Setters at their Best," a Robert Hannon article
Horses -" John Crounse and his Homemeade Horse Remedy Book - To Cure Man and Beast," an article from the Altamont Enterprise
Veterinary Colleges - Other - New York College of Veterinary Surgeons
Noted Non-Cornell Veterinarians - images and bios
Noted Non-Cornell Veterinarians - images and bios
Veterinary Unit, ROTC, Carlisle, PA [may include C.E. DeCamp]
Ambulance Co. No. 3, ROTC, Carlisle, PA [may include C.E. DeCamp]
Group photo, XIth International Physiologists Congress, Edinburgh [water damaged and torn]
Group photo, 13th International Physiologists Congress, Boston ‡ [water damaged and stuck to glass]
State Committee on Tuberculosis and Public Health of the State Charities Aid Association - Notice of 20th Anniversary
U.S. Bureau of Animal Industry Map of the U.S. showing Boundary Line of the District Infected wits Splenetic or southern Cattle Fever
U.S. Bureau of Animal Industry Map of the U.S. Showing Boundary Line of the Quarantine for Tick Fever of Cattle
Poster - Representative Veterinarians of New York State
Guidebook with list of names featured in the poster, "Representative Veterinarians of New York State"
Broadside - New York Dept of Ag Foot and Mouth Disease Quarantine Notice
Broadside - New York Dept of Ag Foot and Mouth Disease Quarantine Notice
33 1/3 record - "The Aged Dog" by William K Riddell and James Rooney
Universidade de Sao Paulo certificate and pennant
Miscellaneous Veterinary Illustrations, some by C.R. Redwood
Miscellaneous Veterinary Illustrations, some by C.R. Redwood
